basics.name: Manula Sameera
basics.label: Software Developer & Researcher
basics.summary: Building thoughtful digital systems for the real world. Developer & researcher working across full-stack web, mobile, and IoT — currently shipping public-sector software in Sri Lanka and exploring smart-agriculture mesh networks.

work.name: Presidential Secretariat
work.summary: Focused exclusively on software development for the President's Office — shipping internal tools, line-of-business systems, and public-facing platforms. Building across the stack with .NET, modern web frameworks, and SQL databases; coordinating closely with stakeholders on requirements and rollout.

work.name: Divisional Secretariat
work.summary: Developed and managed IT solutions across software, database administration, website management, and ICT policy drafting for the secretariat. Administered networks and ensured security — covering maintenance, troubleshooting, cybersecurity, and end-to-end IT project implementation.

work.name: Vocational Training Authority
work.summary: Delivered engaging lectures and hands-on practical sessions across Office productivity, networking, graphics design, and software programming. Equipped students with current industry skills, resulting in high certification pass rates and strong career-readiness outcomes. Guided real-world project work that anchored theory in genuine problems and impact.

work.name: Vocational Training Authority
work.summary: Assisted and instructed students across classroom and lab environments. Ran practical sessions and managed lab logistics for cohort-based learning. Helped students convert practical IT skills into measurable career-readiness.

work.name: Department of Registrar of Companies
work.summary: Monitored and maintained networks for optimal performance; tested and analyzed systems to identify and report bugs. Implemented requirements in Java and MySQL and performed database management and troubleshooting. Built early hands-on experience with IT infrastructure and core technologies.

projects.name: Smart Agriculture IoT Management App
highlights: Flutter application for managing ESP32-based Smart Agriculture mesh networks (SmartAgriMesh) with real-time sensor monitoring, data visualization, and AI analytics

projects.name: Mobile Government Service Feedback System
highlights: PHP-based system for tracking and gathering feedback from participants of mobile government services — public form with reCAPTCHA protection and a secure admin panel with issue tracking and reporting

projects.name: Leave Management System
highlights: Enterprise-grade Flutter application for managing employee leave requests — complete workflow from application submission to approval, with multi-language support and real-time notifications
